description: Style NoteTake nautical style to an all new high with this pair from ganuchi. With a innovative new update to the classic boat shoe, this versatile piece looks great with off-duty ensembles (not just lounge wear) The lovely blue upper and midsole is designed with a greased feel for a pared down, downtown cool. Style this with rolled up denims and a tonal monochrome tee for a minimalist look. Throw on a beige casual blazer and replace the tee for a linen casual shirt for a more dressy vibe. Product Details Round toed boat shoes with two hole lace-ups and slip on stylingEyelets and braid detail around the mouth of the shoeMildly padded inner and a soft footbedPU midsole with an intentional greased lookRubber outsole in white with herringbone grooves all overMaterial and CareLeatherUse a leather conditioner to clean productDo not store in direct sunlight
